title: Implement a Windows Server hybrid cloud infrastructure

sections.title: Implement a Windows Server hybrid cloud infrastructure

lessons.title: Implement hybrid network infrastructure
lessons.content_md:
You learn to connect your on-premises environment to Azure, implement subnets and routing between your on-premises and cloud environments, and ensure that workloads in the cloud and on-premises perform DNS resolution to locate each other.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-hybrid-network-infrastructure/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

lessons.title: Implement hybrid identity with Windows Server
lessons.content_md:
Implement hybrid identity with Windows Server

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-hybrid-identity-windows-server/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Implement hybrid identity with Windows Server

lessons.title: Migrate on-premises Windows Server instances to Azure IaaS virtual machines
lessons.content_md:
You're able to plan a migration and select appropriate server migration tools. You'll also learn how to use Azure Migrate, how to assess physical servers, and how to migrate those servers.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/migrate-premises-windows-server-instances-azure-iaas-virtual-machines/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Migrate on-premises Windows Server instances to Azure IaaS virtual machines

lessons.title: Implement a hybrid file server infrastructure
lessons.content_md:
Implement a hybrid file server infrastructure using Azure Files and Azure File Sync, and migrate SMB file servers to Azure.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-hybrid-file-server-infrastructure/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Implement a hybrid file server infrastructure

lessons.title: Implement hybrid backup and recovery with Windows Server IaaS
lessons.content_md:
Learn about Azure Backup before learning to implement Recovery Vaults and Azure Backup Policies. Learn to implement Windows IaaS VM recovery, perform backup and restore of on-premises workloads, and manage Azure VM backups.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-hybrid-backup-recovery-windows-server-iaas/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Implement hybrid backup and recovery with Windows Server IaaS

lessons.title: Implement scale and high availability with Windows Server VM
lessons.content_md:
Learn how to implement scaling for virtual machine scale sets and load-balanced VMs. Also learn how to implement Azure Site Recovery.

Fuente oficial: https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/training/modules/implement-scale-high-availability-windows-server-virtual-machine/?WT.mc_id=api_CatalogApi

sources.title: Implement scale and high availability with Windows Server VM

labs.title: Laboratorio opcional: aplica Implement a Windows Server hybrid cloud infrastructure
labs.instructions_md: Lleva a la practica lo aprendido en **Implement a Windows Server hybrid cloud infrastructure**. Implementa un escenario pequeno y documenta tu solucion. Este laboratorio es opcional pero refuerza la retencion.

rubric.description: La solucion cumple el objetivo del laboratorio.
La explicacion es comprensible y ordenada.
